validateAll.note: Validators pass, but launch-claim readiness is bounded by this audit because durable/external/auth/deployment proof remains open.

requiredCaveats: No durable restart/resume guarantee until Supabase proof passes
No external executor guarantee until credentialed proof passes
No protected commercial access guarantee until auth proof passes
No deployment or preview-sharing guarantee until smoke/rollback proof passes

P0.summary: This branch contains the proof, but main cannot claim it until the branch is merged and the commands pass on main.
P0.remediation: Merge work into main, then rerun build/test/validate/proof on main.

P0.summary: Supabase durable queue/repository restart-resume proof is still not proven from this environment.
P0.remediation: Run the full proof with real SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in durable mode, then capture restart/resume evidence.

P0.summary: External executor/API-key backed build path remains unproven by the local orchestration-core proof.
P0.remediation: Run the full build-path proof with a real executor credential and confirm generated output is produced by the intended executor path.

P0.summary: Protected commercial route proof with configured auth is not proven locally.
P0.remediation: Use approved secret injection and prove invited tester auth/authorization behavior.

P0.summary: Do not claim public launch readiness until proof passes from main with durable storage, auth, executor, and deployment gates proven.
P0.remediation: Update claim boundaries only after green main evidence exists.

P1.summary: Production/preview deployment smoke proof remains outside this local orchestration-core proof.
P1.remediation: Run credential-gated deployment dry-run or approved preview deployment proof and record rollback/smoke evidence if beta includes deployment.

P1.summary: Friends-and-family operations packet now documents invite scope, caveats, support/escalation, incident response, disable/rollback, and privacy/logging notice.
Operations packet and readiness audit define run IDs, failure evidence collection, support intake, and privacy boundaries.
P1.remediation: Run npm run audit:friends-family-beta before invites and attach friends-family-beta-readiness.json to the pilot record.

branchMerge.summary: The branch contains proof:orchestration-core, regular test coverage for the regression, memory queue core, and proof artifacts.
Reported commit fea564272060ec54e40d2935df3eb6a2f8be0933 is not present in the local object database, so the changes were recreated minimally instead of cherry-picked.

proof.summary: Local in-memory worker/wave proof passes with score 100.
npm run test now includes test:orchestration-core.
npm run audit:friends-family-beta writes friends-family-beta-readiness.json with explicit remaining gates.
Main cannot truthfully claim this proof until the PR is merged and proof:orchestration-core passes on main.
External executor output, durable restart/resume, auth, and deployment smoke/rollback remain unproven for real beta users.

deployment.summary: Live deployment execution requires approved credentials and must remain blocked-by-default without them.
Preview URL or generated workspace sharing must not be promised until preview/deployment proof is captured.

securitySecrets.summary: No secrets were added; proof records credential gaps as blockers.
Friends/family testers need least-privilege credentials and authorization proof before protected commercial access.

claimMarketing.summary: Allowed claim after main proof: supervised workflow/orchestration pilot with known limitations. Disallowed: public launch ready, durable queue ready, protected auth proven, deployment ready, or external executor proven.

cleanupOnly.summary: Repo writes both botomatic-full-build-proof.json and BOTOMATIC_FULL_BUILD_PROOF.json for compatibility; future cleanup may standardize naming after downstream references are checked.
The AtlasCRM workspace under release-evidence/runtime/generated-workspaces is evidence-only and not a real customer build.

nextRemediationOrder: Merge this proof/orchestration-worker-wave branch into main.
On main, run npm run build, npm run test, npm run validate:all, npm run proof:orchestration-core, and npm run audit:friends-family-beta.
Decide whether friends-and-family beta includes real external executor generation; if yes, provision approved executor credentials and prove the fresh-project path.
Provision approved durable Supabase proof credentials and rerun durable queue/restart-resume proof in the actual pilot environment.
Configure and prove protected auth for invited testers in the actual pilot environment.
If beta includes deployment or preview sharing, run credential-gated deployment dry-run/preview proof and smoke/rollback evidence.
Use FRIENDS_AND_FAMILY_BETA_OPERATIONS_PACKET.md for invite scope, tester caveats, support channel, incident response, rollback/disable procedure, and privacy/logging notice.
Only after npm run audit:friends-family-beta reports no remaining gaps for the scoped pilot, invite friends/family testers with bounded claims.
